title: Flea Treatment in Millburn, NJ | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Millburn, NJ starting at $350. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Millburn home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Millburn, New Jersey, with proven solutions that eliminate fleas at every life stage. Our experienced technicians use safe, EPA-approved methods to protect your family, pets, and property from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served the Millburn community for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination services. Our licensed professionals understand the unique pest challenges in Essex County and deliver customized treatment plans with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Millburn's tree-lined neighborhoods, historic homes near Taylor Park, and proximity to the South Mountain Reservation create ideal conditions for flea populations, especially in properties with pets or wildlife activity. From the beautiful estates near Short Hills to downtown apartments along Millburn Avenue, our team provides thorough flea treatments tailored to your property's specific needs.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Millburn, NJ?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Millburn typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, because flea eggs can continue hatching for several weeks, we typically recommend a follow-up treatment 14-21 days later to ensure complete elimination of the infestation.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members away from treated areas for 2-4 hours during application, after which it's completely safe to return to normal activities.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation helps maximize treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and floors, washing pet bedding, and removing pets during treatment. Our technicians will provide you with a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your Millburn flea treatment service.
